siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Snatch Balance, 1 by 3. Strength: Overhead Squat, 4 by 6 at 50 percent. Strength: DB Windmill, 3 by 10. Gymnastics: GHD Sit-ups. Metcon: Snatch Complex. EMOM 15 minutes: 00:00, 03:00, 06:00, 09:00, 12:00. For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats/rows), hamstrings, rear delts.
